name: Pizza Bread- 1 Pound Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Italian herb seasoning or equivalent of dried herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine water, olive oil, sugar, Italian herb seasoning or dried herbs, salt, parmesan cheese, onion powder, garlic powder, all-purpose flour, and whole wheat flour.
3. Mix until a dough forms. Add cheddar cheese and chopped pepperoni.
4. Place the dough in a greased baking dish, shape into a loaf, and cover with plastic wrap.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
6. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing and serving.
